title: 6.0 COM Rx processing using SUM_SSC - Authenticated Message (MAC)

content.text: This page is to summarize the COM Rx processing in VIP using SUM_SSC for MAC protected signals

items: When a signal is received by COM, it will call the respective callback configured for the callback
In the callback, the update and timeout flag is set
and an event for the signal is set to OS
OS will call respective Rx runnable in SUM_SSC
In SUM_SSC, the MAC id is checked whether it is inside MAC limit. If yes then PNC and ComM status is checked
Then the Rx queue is filled with MAC, ARC and signal data from Signal group
Counter sync of the message is calculate and added to Rx Queue
Cyclic Rx Runnable from OS will be scheduled
In this runnable, SUM SSC will process Rx queue, Calculate MAC → If MAC verification is successful, it will send the data to respective SWC Rte ports
Also calls SUM_SSM to Calculate ARC
